records.question: Which machines belong to the team Givi Racing- Honda?

records.question: Which machines from series RS125 have a quality rank of at least 4 and are linked to repair assignments?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT machine.machine_id FROM machine
JOIN repair_assignment ON machine.machine_id = repair_assignment.machine_id
WHERE machine.machine_series = 'RS125' AND machine.quality_rank >= 4
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Machine_ID FROM machine AS T1 WHERE T1.Machine_series = 'RS125' AND T1.quality_rank >= 4 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM repair_assignment AS T2 WHERE T2.Machine_ID = T1.Machine_ID)

records.question: Which machines have had a repair with the name OPS 3467?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT machine.machine_id FROM machine
JOIN repair_assignment ON machine.machine_id = repair_assignment.machine_id
JOIN repair ON repair_assignment.repair_id = repair.repair_id
WHERE repair.name = 'OPS 3467'

records.question: Which machines with a quality rank of at least 2 have repair notes that are exactly repair Failed. Failed to achieve orbit?

JOIN repair_assignment ON machine.machine_id = repair_assignment.machine_id

WHERE machine.quality_rank >= 2 AND repair.notes = 'repair Failed. Failed to achieve orbit'

  T1.Machine_ID
FROM machine AS T1
INNER JOIN repair_assignment AS T2
  ON T1.Machine_ID = T2.Machine_ID
INNER JOIN repair AS T3
  ON T2.repair_ID = T3.repair_ID
WHERE
  T1.quality_rank >= 2 AND T3.Notes = 'repair Failed. Failed to achieve orbit'
